chunks.title: Genealogy of Aaron and Moses
chunks.reason: Introduces the sons of Aaron and notes the death of Nadab and Abihu.

chunks.title: Appointment of Levites to Aaron
chunks.reason: Divine command to set apart the tribe of Levi for priestly service.

chunks.title: Theological Basis for Levites
chunks.reason: Explains the substitution of Levites for the firstborn based on the Exodus.

chunks.title: Enumeration of Levi's Sons
chunks.reason: Lists the three main families and their sub-families.

chunks.title: Gershonites Census and Duties
chunks.reason: Details the count, camp location, leader, and specific responsibilities of the Gershonites.

chunks.title: Kohathites Census and Duties
chunks.reason: Details the count, camp location, leader, and specific responsibilities of the Kohathites.

chunks.title: Merarites Census and Duties
chunks.reason: Details the count, camp location, leader, and specific responsibilities of the Merarites.

chunks.title: Camp Arrangement and Total Count
chunks.reason: Describes the placement of Moses and Aaron and summarizes the total number of Levites.

chunks.title: Census of Firstborns
chunks.reason: Narrates the counting of Israel's firstborn males to compare with the Levites.

chunks.title: Redemption of Firstborns
chunks.reason: Establishes the redemption price for excess firstborns and records the payment.
